subcodes.first_line: O Abraham! The fire of Nimrod hath become as a flower-garden, and the tyranny of that obdurate one hath been transformed into the justice of the All-Loving Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابراهیم آتش نمرود گلشن موجود گشت و ظلم شخص عنود عدل رب ودود شد پس از
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment
